name: No Bake Oatmeal- Peanut Butter Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir and combine the cocoa, granulated sugar, margarine, and milk until well mixed.
2. Heat until boiling for 1 minute only, then remove from heat.
3. Beat in the peanut butter, instant oatmeal, and vanilla extract.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper.
5. Allow to stand until firm.
